name: hanna-barbera
description: 1960s Saturday-morning animation cel look — flat color, thick outlines.
style_suffix: in the style of a 1960s Hanna-Barbera animation cel, flat vector shapes with thick black ink outlines, limited color palette of teal, mustard, orange, and cream, simple geometric figures with expressive oval eyes, textured paper backgrounds with minimal detail, mid-century modern shapes, hand-painted cel over a gouache background, retro Saturday-morning cartoon look
